nasb.text: From the day that the ark remained at Kiriath-jearim, the time was long, for it was twenty years; and all the house of Israel lamented after the Lord.

esv.text: From the day that the ark was lodged at Kiriath-jearim, a long time passed, some twenty years, and all the house of Israel lamented after the Lord.

cnv.text: 約櫃停留在基列．耶琳很久，有二十年之久，以色列全家都痛悔尋求耶和華。

ccb.text: 约柜在基列·耶琳停留了二十年。那时，全体以色列人都痛悔地寻求耶和华。
